cards.name: Holon's Castform
rules: You may attach this as an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon that already has an Energy card attached to it. When you attach this card, return an Energy card attached to that Pokémon to your hand. While attached, this card is a Special Energy card and provides every type of Energy but 2 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.)

attacks.name: Delta Draw
attacks.text: Count the number of Pokémon you have in play that has δ on its card. Draw up to that many cards.

tests.name: can_attach_as_energy
tests.description: Test that Holon's Castform can be attached as Energy to Pokemon with Energy

tests.name: cannot_attach_without_existing_energy
tests.description: Test that Holon's Castform cannot be attached to Pokemon without Energy

tests.name: returns_energy_when_attached
tests.description: Test that attaching Holon's Castform returns an Energy to hand

tests.name: provides_all_types_as_energy
tests.description: Test that attached Holon's Castform provides all types of Energy

tests.name: provides_two_energy
tests.description: Test that attached Holon's Castform counts as 2 Energy

tests.name: can_play_as_basic_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Holon's Castform can be played as a Basic Pokemon

tests.name: delta_draw_counts_delta_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Delta Draw draws cards equal to delta Pokemon in play
